column1: # Device info fixture for the fboss101 / fboss102 live-device smoke test.
# Only the hostname and operating_system fields are populated — those are
# enough for async_get_device_driver to pick FbossSwitch from
# DEVICE_OS_DRIVER_CLASS_MAP. Add IP / MAC / role / hardware once they're
# known if you want richer SwitchAttributes (e.g. for role-based health
